# Active Directory Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — ad_read tool (Active Directory read-only).

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `ad_read` | Read-only Active Directory queries: list/search users, groups, and OUs; fetch single user or group by DN or name. | `ad:read` | — | — |
| `ad_write` | Active Directory write operations: disable/enable/unlock users, reset passwords, create users, manage group membership. | `ad:write` | ✓ | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "base_dn": "",
  "domain": "",
  "ldap_bind_dn": "",
  "ldap_connect_timeout_seconds": 10,
  "ldap_url": "",
  "ldap_verify_ssl": true,
  "log_actions_in_description": false,
  "password_policy_length": 16,
  "protected_groups": [
    "Domain Admins",
    "Enterprise Admins",
    "Schema Admins",
    "Administrators"
  ],
  "protected_users": [
    "Administrator",
    "krbtgt",
    "Guest"
  ],
  "quarantine_ou": "",
  "ssh_command_timeout_seconds": 60,
  "ssh_host": "",
  "ssh_port": 22,
  "ssh_user": "",
  "write_enabled": false
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `base_dn` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Base DN used as default search root for reads and as the organizational scope for protected-list matching. Example: 'DC=corp,DC=contoso,DC=local'. |
| `domain` | `string` | — | — | `""` | AD domain DNS name, e.g. 'corp.contoso.local'. |
| `ldap_bind_dn` | `string` | — | — | `""` | DN of the read-only service account used by ad_read. |
| `ldap_bind_password` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | Password for ldap_bind_dn (stored encrypted). |
| `ldap_connect_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | — | — | `10` | Connection + operation timeout (seconds). |
| `ldap_url` | `string` | — | — | `""` | LDAP(S) server URL used by ad_read. Example: 'ldaps://dc01.corp.contoso.local:636'. |
| `ldap_verify_ssl` | `boolean` | — | — | `true` | Validate the LDAP server TLS certificate. Default true. |
| `log_actions_in_description` | `boolean` | — | — | `false` | When true, ad_write appends a single-line action log to the target object's 'description' attribute after success. Format: '[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC] <action> by gSage: <summary>'. |
| `password_policy_length` | `integer` | — | — | `16` | Length of passwords generated by reset_password. |
| `protected_groups` | `array` | — | — | `["Domain Admins", "Enterprise Admins", "Schema Admins", "Administrators"]` | Groups that ad_write MUST NEVER modify. Matches CN, full DN, or fnmatch glob (case-insensitive). Also blocks group membership changes where either side is protected. |
| `protected_users` | `array` | — | — | `["Administrator", "krbtgt", "Guest"]` | Users that ad_write MUST NEVER touch. Matches sAMAccountName, full DN, or fnmatch glob (case-insensitive). |
| `quarantine_ou` | `string` | — | — | `""` | OU DN where disabled users are moved when disable_user is called with move_to_quarantine=true. Example: 'OU=Disabled Users,DC=corp,DC=contoso,DC=local'. |
| `ssh_command_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | — | — | `60` | Maximum time to wait for a pwsh script to complete. |
| `ssh_host` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Windows jump host (FQDN or IP) with OpenSSH Server, PowerShell 7, and the RSAT ActiveDirectory module installed. |
| `ssh_known_hosts` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | Optional OpenSSH known_hosts content used to pin the jump host's public key. When empty, host-key checking is disabled (operator is responsible for the network path). |
| `ssh_port` | `integer` | — | — | `22` | SSH port on the jump host (default 22). |
| `ssh_private_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | PEM/OpenSSH private key content for ssh_user (stored encrypted). Passphrase-less keys only. |
| `ssh_user` | `string` | — | — | `""` | Local Windows / AD user that PowerShell should impersonate. Must have permission to run the AD cmdlets used by ad_write. |
| `write_enabled` | `boolean` | — | — | `false` | Master switch for ad_write. When false, every write action fails with CONFIG_WRITE_DISABLED. Default false. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__BASE_DN` | `base_dn` | `string` | `""` | — | Base DN used as default search root for reads and as the organizational scope for protected-list matching. Example: 'DC=corp,DC=contoso,DC=local'. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__DOMAIN` | `domain` | `string` | `""` | — | AD domain DNS name, e.g. 'corp.contoso.local'. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__LDAP_BIND_DN` | `ldap_bind_dn` | `string` | `""` | — | DN of the read-only service account used by ad_read. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__LDAP_BIND_PASSWORD` | `ldap_bind_password` | `string` | — | ✓ | Password for ldap_bind_dn (stored encrypted). |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__LDAP_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | `ldap_connect_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | `10` | — | Connection + operation timeout (seconds). |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__LDAP_URL` | `ldap_url` | `string` | `""` | — | LDAP(S) server URL used by ad_read. Example: 'ldaps://dc01.corp.contoso.local:636'. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__LDAP_VERIFY_SSL` | `ldap_verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | — | Validate the LDAP server TLS certificate. Default true. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__LOG_ACTIONS_IN_DESCRIPTION` | `log_actions_in_description` | `boolean` | `false` | — | When true, ad_write appends a single-line action log to the target object's 'description' attribute after success. Format: '[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC] <action> by gSage: <summary>'. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__PASSWORD_POLICY_LENGTH` | `password_policy_length` | `integer` | `16` | — | Length of passwords generated by reset_password. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__PROTECTED_GROUPS` | `protected_groups` | `array` | `["Domain Admins", "Enterprise Admins", "Schema Admins", "Administrators"]` | — | Groups that ad_write MUST NEVER modify. Matches CN, full DN, or fnmatch glob (case-insensitive). Also blocks group membership changes where either side is protected. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__PROTECTED_USERS` | `protected_users` | `array` | `["Administrator", "krbtgt", "Guest"]` | — | Users that ad_write MUST NEVER touch. Matches sAMAccountName, full DN, or fnmatch glob (case-insensitive). |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__QUARANTINE_OU` | `quarantine_ou` | `string` | `""` | — | OU DN where disabled users are moved when disable_user is called with move_to_quarantine=true. Example: 'OU=Disabled Users,DC=corp,DC=contoso,DC=local'. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__SSH_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | `ssh_command_timeout_seconds` | `integer` | `60` | — | Maximum time to wait for a pwsh script to complete. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__SSH_HOST` | `ssh_host` | `string` | `""` | — | Windows jump host (FQDN or IP) with OpenSSH Server, PowerShell 7, and the RSAT ActiveDirectory module installed. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS` | `ssh_known_hosts` | `string` | — | ✓ | Optional OpenSSH known_hosts content used to pin the jump host's public key. When empty, host-key checking is disabled (operator is responsible for the network path). |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__SSH_PORT` | `ssh_port` | `integer` | `22` | — | SSH port on the jump host (default 22). |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__SSH_PRIVATE_KEY` | `ssh_private_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | PEM/OpenSSH private key content for ssh_user (stored encrypted). Passphrase-less keys only. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__SSH_USER` | `ssh_user` | `string` | `""` | — | Local Windows / AD user that PowerShell should impersonate. Must have permission to run the AD cmdlets used by ad_write. |
| `TOOL_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY__WRITE_ENABLED` | `write_enabled` | `boolean` | `false` | — | Master switch for ad_write. When false, every write action fails with CONFIG_WRITE_DISABLED. Default false. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `ad_read`

- **`list_users`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `ou` | `string` | — | Base OU DN to search under (list_users / list_groups / list_ous). Defaults to config.base_dn when omitted. |
  | `enabled` | `boolean` | — | list_users only: filter by account enabled/disabled state. |

- **`list_groups`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `ou` | `string` | — | Base OU DN to search under (list_users / list_groups / list_ous). Defaults to config.base_dn when omitted. |

- **`list_ous`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `ou` | `string` | — | Base OU DN to search under (list_users / list_groups / list_ous). Defaults to config.base_dn when omitted. |
  | `mode` | `string` | — | list_ous only: 'flat' (default) or 'tree'. |

- **`get_user`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Full DN of the user (get_user). |
  | `sam_account_name` | `string` | — | sAMAccountName of the user (get_user). |

- **`get_group`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `group_dn` | `string` | — | Full DN of the group (get_group). |
  | `group_name` | `string` | — | CN of the group (get_group). |


### `ad_write`

- **`disable_user`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Target user DN. Required for: disable_user, enable_user, unlock_user, reset_password, force_password_change, modify_group_membership. |
  | `move_to_quarantine` | `boolean` | — | disable_user only: move the user to config.quarantine_ou after disabling. Default true. |

- **`enable_user`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Target user DN. Required for: disable_user, enable_user, unlock_user, reset_password, force_password_change, modify_group_membership. |

- **`unlock_user`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Target user DN. Required for: disable_user, enable_user, unlock_user, reset_password, force_password_change, modify_group_membership. |

- **`reset_password`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Target user DN. Required for: disable_user, enable_user, unlock_user, reset_password, force_password_change, modify_group_membership. |
  | `length` | `integer` | — | reset_password only: length of the generated one-time password. Defaults to config.password_policy_length. |

- **`force_password_change`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Target user DN. Required for: disable_user, enable_user, unlock_user, reset_password, force_password_change, modify_group_membership. |

- **`create_user`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `sam_account_name` | `string` | — | create_user only: sAMAccountName for the new user (must be unique). |
  | `display_name` | `string` | — | create_user only: display name / full name. |
  | `given_name` | `string` | — | create_user only: first name. |
  | `surname` | `string` | — | create_user only: last name. |
  | `ou_dn` | `string` | — | create_user only: OU DN where the user will be created. |
  | `user_principal_name` | `string` | — | create_user only: UPN (e.g. 'alice@corp.local'). |
  | `initial_password` | `string` | — | create_user only: optional initial password. When omitted, a random one is generated and returned in the result. |
  | `enabled` | `boolean` | — | create_user only: enable the account immediately. Default false. |
  | `groups` | `array` | — | create_user only: list of group DNs or CNs the new user should be added to (subject to protected_groups). |

- **`modify_group_membership`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `user_dn` | `string` | — | Target user DN. Required for: disable_user, enable_user, unlock_user, reset_password, force_password_change, modify_group_membership. |
  | `group_dn` | `string` | — | Target group DN. Required for: modify_group_membership. |
  | `operation` | `string` | — | modify_group_membership only: whether to add or remove the user from the group. |

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `ad_read` | `ad:read` |
| `ad_write` | `ad:write` |
